title: Breaking Bad
notes: Peak television. Incredible character development and tension. Bryan Cranston is magnificent.

title: Spirited Away
notes: Absolute masterpiece by Studio Ghibli and Hayao Miyazaki. Beautiful animation and music.

title: Inception
notes: Mind-bending heist thriller by Christopher Nolan. Visual effects and Hans Zimmer's score are timeless.

title: Crash Landing on You
notes: Highly recommended K-Drama. Classic star-crossed lovers premise set in North/South Korea.

title: Attack on Titan
notes: Action-packed, intense, and deeply philosophical. The world-building and plot twists are unparalleled.

title: The Dark Knight
notes: Arguably the best superhero movie of all time. Heath Ledger's performance as the Joker is legendary.
